{{Expand}}

{{Infobox technique
| name = Broken Star
| introduced = Blackflame
}}

== Blackflame ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Broken Star]] is a [[Path]] that would take too long to find.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c9">''Blackflame'', chapter 9</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Techniques]]
[[Category:Blackflame]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
